title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DMart Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart Advisory Limited:
DMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
